message:
fix: connector stats off-by-one, object store race, test corrections + quality pass

Bug fixes:
- Anthropic and OpenAI connector.rs: pre-compute requests_total with
  saturating_add(1) before building the JSON stats response, fixing
  an off-by-one where the current request was not counted in the
  reported total
- fcp-store object_store.rs: fix race condition in MemoryObjectStore::put()
  where optimistic quota increment could leave used_bytes inflated on
  duplicate-key rejection. Now holds write lock through both duplicate
  and quota checks, only incrementing used_bytes after successful insert

Test fixes:
- fcp-ratelimit leaky_bucket.rs: rewrite try_acquire_n test to validate
  real batch permit acquisition (was asserting n>1 always fails, which
  tested the wrong behavior — now verifies batch of 2 succeeds, second
  batch fails due to insufficient remaining permits, single permit
  succeeds, then bucket is full)
- fcp-sandbox sandbox.rs: make create_sandbox test platform-portable
  by checking platform_name() against cfg!(target_os) instead of
  hardcoding "linux"

Quality improvements:
- fcp-cli package/mod.rs: isolate packaging builds by setting
  CARGO_TARGET_DIR to the crate-local target directory, preventing
  interference from parent-process target-dir settings; extract
  resolve_target_dir() helper with unit test
- fcp-conformance policy_bundle_schema.rs: add log_version "v2" field
  and nest bundle_id under a context object for structured log schema
  evolution
- telegram/vectordb: add clippy allow entries for single_match_else,
  assertions_on_constants, match_same_arms, unreadable_literal,
  use_self, manual_let_else, needless_pass_by_value
- fcp-oauth token.rs: reformat closure indentation in needs_refresh_within

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,10 +19,15 @@
     clippy::option_if_let_else,
     clippy::or_fun_call,
     clippy::redundant_closure_for_method_calls,
+    clippy::single_match_else,
     clippy::single_match,
+    clippy::assertions_on_constants,
+    clippy::match_same_arms,
     clippy::struct_field_names,
     clippy::too_many_lines,
+    clippy::unreadable_literal,
     clippy::unused_async,
+    clippy::use_self,
     clippy::wildcard_imports
 )]
